ops.text: Refactor Service listeners, centralize Supabase config, and optimize Editor scroll performance

ops.content:
package com.conduit.nexus

object ConduitConfig {
    const val SUPABASE_URL = "https://xvldfsmxskhemkslsbym.supabase.co"
    const val GEMINI_FUNCTION_PATH = "/functions/v1/gemini-handler"
    const val DEFAULT_STORAGE_ROOT = "/storage/emulated/0"
    const val CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 90L
}

    const val DEFAULT_STORAGE_ROOT = "/storage/emulated/0"
    const val CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 90L
}
